steps.title: Build the cost expression
steps.content: Each canvas costs $2.15$ dollars, so $c$ canvases cost $2.15c$. Each tube of paint costs $1.70$ dollars, so $t$ tubes cost $1.70t$.

steps.title: Apply the budget limit
steps.content:
Nora has at most $18$ dollars to spend. The total cost must be less than or equal to $18$.
$$2.15c+1.70t\leq 18$$
The answer is A.
